ddls:
CREATE TABLE "public_artworks" (
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artwork */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the park where the artwork is located */,
  "art_title" TEXT /* Title of the artwork */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the artist who created the artwork */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the artwork (typically the city's park district) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the artwork was installed */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) used in the artwork */,
  "style" TEXT /* Artistic style of the artwork */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the artwork */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to a high-resolution image of the artwork */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the artwork */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X coordinate of the artwork's location */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y coordinate of the artwork's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the artwork's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the artwork's location */,
  "location" TEXT /* String representation of the artwork's location (latitude, longitude) */,
  "geojson" TEXT /* GeoJSON representation of the artwork's location */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the last maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "artist_email" TEXT /* Email address of the artist */,
  "artist_website" TEXT /* Website of the artist */,
  "artist_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the artwork */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., inspection, cleaning, repair) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the maintenance activity */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity */,
  "log_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park */,
  "park_number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to the park */,
  "park_address" TEXT /* Address of the park */,
  "park_area" TEXT /* Area of the park in square meters */,
  "park_type" TEXT /* Type of park (e.g., public, private, historical) */,
  "park_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the park's location */,
  "park_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the park's location */,
  "park_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the park */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("park_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the park where the artwork is located
Unique identifier for the artist who created the artwork
Owner of the artwork (typically the city's park district)
Date when the artwork was installed
URL to a high-resolution image of the artwork
X coordinate of the artwork's location
Y coordinate of the artwork's location
String representation of the artwork's location (latitude, longitude)
GeoJSON representation of the artwork's location
Date of the next scheduled inspection
Status of the last maintenance activity
Unique identifier for each maintenance log
Type of maintenance (e.g., inspection, cleaning, repair)
Detailed description of the maintenance activity
Unique number assigned to the park
Area of the park in square meters
Type of park (e.g., public, private, historical)
